title: Jetstick
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
'''Jetsticks''' or jet-sticks were a two-man vehicle, described as "rocket powered platforms" used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and by private individuals. They hovered over the ground, about five feet up, and provided quick transport over uneven terrain.

Jetsticks were used by the Imperial forces on [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]] as well as by the anthropologists [[Owen Lars/Legends|Owen]] and [[Beru Whitesun Lars/Legends|Beru Lars]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs]] and [[Windy Starkiller|Windy]] borrowed them to search for [[Annikin Starkiller]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]].

==Behind the scenes==
The "jetstick" is the conceptual ancestor of the [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]]. The presence of the jetsticks on Yavin is indicative of the rough draft as a major source for [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|Episode VI]].

==Sources==
